channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: To read our write-up in full, see here: https://t.co/Myerlx5khU
item.author: @AnthropicAI

item.title: Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-qual...
item.description:
Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants didn’t notice. There are plenty of other ways they can go wrong.
Policy and legal frameworks will need to adapt to keep up.
--- @AnthropicAI | ❤️ 18 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 3014
item.author: @AnthropicAI

item.title: Someone obviously did not wake up a loser today.
item.author: @tunguz

item.title:
New Anthropic research: Project Deal.
We created a marketplace for employees in our San Francisco o...
item.description:
New Anthropic research: Project Deal.
We created a marketplace for employees in our San Francisco office, with one big twist. We tasked Claude with buying, selling and negotiating on our colleagues’ behalf. https://t.co/H2f6cLDlAW
--- @AnthropicAI | ❤️ 271 | 🔁 21 | 💬 38 | 👁 10733

item.title: 今天集中做了 wanman 的移动端适配，图片是我在手机上要求 wanman 接管我的一个开源项目并自动进行开发的过程。可以看到它指派了 3 个开发工程师进行工作，另外，这个版本也支持查看已授权的 A...
item.author: @turingou

item.title:
提示词：
帮我画一张信息图： @牛叔 闺女说AI 时代英语老师也有办法，他布置一个大作文，分成三次交，第一部分是你收集的素材或者研究材料摘要，第二部分交写作提纲，第三部分交正式作文。你以为完事了？...
